ogTitle: Mia Mia vs Middle Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mia Mia and Middle Creek.
heading: Mia Mia vs Middle Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mia Mia, Victoria and Middle Creek, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Middle Creek has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Mia Mia (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mia Mia or Middle Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mia Mia has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Middle Creek scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mia Mia scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Middle Creek scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mia Mia or Middle Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Middle Creek has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
